name: @wippy/wc-monaco
title: Monaco Editor
description: Lazy-loaded Monaco editor + diff editor as a Wippy web component. Two modes: editor (single editable buffer, emits change events) and diff (side-by-side read-only baseline vs current). Auto-themed from app CSS variables by default; opt-in `keeper-dark` / `keeper-light` presets. Monaco bundle loads on first use (~1.5 MB gzipped) and is cached page-lifetime. Designed to extract to a standalone @wippy-fe/* package later.

wippy.description: Lazy-loaded VS Code Monaco editor as a custom element. Two modes: mode="editor" renders a single editable buffer driven by the `value` prop (read the latest text via the `change` event's detail.value, and force-set a new buffer by re-rendering with a different `value`). mode="diff" renders a side-by-side read-only diff with `baseline` (original) and `current` (modified). Both modes accept a Monaco `language` id (lua, javascript, typescript, json, markdown, plaintext, etc.) — pass an unknown language and Monaco silently falls back to plain text. The `theme` prop defaults to `auto`, which derives a Monaco palette from the host's CSS variables (--p-content-background, --p-text-color, --p-primary-color, --p-surface-*) and re-themes live on prefers-color-scheme / [data-theme] flips; pin a fixed look with theme="keeper-dark" or "keeper-light". Set `min-height` to a number of pixels (default 0 means fill the container). Don't pass content as text children — use the `value` / `baseline` / `current` props. The Monaco bundle is loaded once on first instantiation (~1.5 MB gzipped) and cached for the page lifetime; subsequent instances mount immediately.

mode.description: Editor mode (single buffer) or diff mode (baseline vs current).

language.description: Monaco language id (e.g. lua, javascript, typescript, json, markdown).

value.description: Initial buffer value for editor mode. Ignored in diff mode.

baseline.description: Original side of the diff (read-only). Diff mode only.

current.description: Modified side of the diff (read-only). Diff mode only.

readonly.description: Editor mode only. Diff mode is always read-only.

theme.description: Color theme. `auto` derives from app CSS variables (--p-content-background, --p-text-color, --p-primary-500, --p-surface-*) and re-themes on prefers-color-scheme / [data-theme] changes. `keeper-dark` and `keeper-light` are fixed presets.

min-height.description: Minimum height in px. 0 means fill the container.

change.description: Editor mode: fired on every content change with the full buffer in detail.value.
